Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x60AE "DRJ-60AE" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dr. J.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Patched the JMP $6F62 instruction at $6148 to be JMP $4000 instead to skip the password protection step.
